hero.imageAlt: Guest room at Residence Le Farfalle — Isola di Capo Rizzuto, Calabria
hero.locationPill: Town centre Isola di Capo Rizzuto · strategic location
hero.headline: Residence Le Farfalle
hero.headlineAccent: Design B&B in the village heart — close to everything
hero.trustLine: 4 private suites · curated interiors · generous breakfast · tailored services
hero.tagline: Spacious, bright rooms with private bathrooms, boutique-level comfort and a warm welcome. Fresh breakfast every morning, superfast WiFi and everything you need to enjoy the best of the Ionian coast without giving up the town centre.
hero.whatsappPrefill: Hello! I would like information about Residence Le Farfalle

homeRooms.heading: Our rooms
homeRooms.sub: Four different spaces, all tastefully styled: comfy beds, modern bathrooms, air conditioning and the little details that matter after a day by the sea.

perche.title: Why choose Le Farfalle
perche.sub: More than a place to sleep: an elegant base in the centre of Isola di Capo Rizzuto, with a breakfast worth the trip and the sea a short drive away.

items.title: Minutes from Marine Protected Area beaches
items.description: The sea is close and easy to reach — perfect for relaxed days.

items.title: Breakfast included — always generous
items.description: Sweet and savoury, coffee and juices: fuel up before the beach or a day trip.

items.title: Curated interiors, premium holiday-home comfort
items.description: Clean, bright spaces designed for real relaxation.

items.title: Town centre — walk everywhere
items.description: Bars, restaurants and services within a few minutes.

items.title: 9.4/10 · Excellent on Booking.com
items.description: A score that speaks for itself.

servicesSection.heading: Services for guests who expect more
servicesSection.sub: From a proper good-morning spread to itinerary support: many services included, others on request — just ask.

breakfast.title: Breakfast included
breakfast.desc: A generous table every morning: sweet and savoury, hot and cold drinks — the right start to your day.

wifi.title: Superfast WiFi
wifi.desc: High-speed fibre throughout — light remote work friendly too.

ac.title: In-room climate
ac.desc: Independent air conditioning for a good night’s sleep, even in peak summer.

tv.title: Smart TV
tv.desc: LED smart TV for a relaxed evening after the beach.

bath.title: Private bathroom
bath.desc: Each room has its own modern bathroom and courtesy set.

transfer.title: Transfers & arrivals
transfer.desc: On request: airport and station transfers — we help you organise.

tours.title: Excursions & sea
tours.desc: Tips on boat tours, MPA snorkelling and inland day trips.

restaurants.title: Local partners
restaurants.desc: A network of restaurants and activities to taste the best of the area.

mareVicino.title: Sea and villages without leaving the centre
mareVicino.intro: Staying downtown means bars, shops and restaurants on your doorstep — and still reaching iconic MPA beaches and Le Castella in just a few minutes by car.

highlights.title: Beaches by car
highlights.desc: MPA beaches are 5–15 minutes away by car from us.

highlights.title: Marine Protected Area
highlights.desc: One of Italy’s largest marine reserves — crystal water and rich seabeds.

highlights.title: Nearby destinations
highlights.desc: Le Castella, Capo Colonna and Crotone are easy day trips.

highlights.title: Shuttle & transfer info
highlights.desc: Ask at the property for shuttle and transfer options.

mareVicino.stripSub: One of Italy’s largest marine reserves. Clear water, snorkelling and diving.

territorio60.heading: The area, lived fully
territorio60.sub: Crystal sea, hilltop villages, authentic food: from the residence you can plan slow days or mini-adventures — here’s what not to miss.

spiagge.title: Postcard beaches
spiagge.excerpt: From fine sand in Capo Rizzuto to coves near Le Castella — a new shade of blue every day.

area-marina.title: Marine Protected Area
area-marina.excerpt: Snorkelling, boats and rich seabeds: one of Italy’s environmental jewels, easy to reach.

borghi.title: Villages & history
borghi.excerpt: Le Castella’s castle on the water, ancient Crotone, Capo Colonna at sunset — Calabria that moves you.

eventi.title: Events & summer
eventi.excerpt: Fish festivals, patron feasts, seafront nights — ask us for the calendar when you book.

escursioni.title: Excursions & nature
escursioni.excerpt: From the Sila to the Valli Cupe, plus coastal boat tours — we point you to safe, memorable experiences.

food.title: Local food scene
food.excerpt: Fresh fish, chilli, olive oil and local wines — we share trattorias where locals eat too.

locationSection.heading: From the residence to the territory
locationSection.sub: Real distances from our rooms: sea, history and inland Calabria within a day trip.

homeCta.title: Your chic base in the centre of Isola di Capo Rizzuto
homeCta.body: Thoughtful breakfast, spacious rooms and tailored tips for the sea, villages and local food. Message us for dates, availability and special requests — we love taking care of guests who choose us.

newsletter.thanksSub: You’ll get news and special offers for your next holiday.
newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.sub: Offers, local tips and news from Residence Le Farfalle

homeFooter.tagline: B&B residence in the centre of Isola di Capo Rizzuto: curated rooms, generous breakfast, full services — and the Marine Protected Area beaches a short drive away.

faq.a: Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 10:00. Flexible times on request.
Contact us for our pet policy.
Continental breakfast included, served every morning.
